heroSubtext: Three pathways to clarity, confidence, and lasting change.

services.title: Mindset Coaching
services.description: My signature programme for women ready to get clear on their goals, values, decision-making, and life's direction. Through weekly one-to-one sessions, we'll uncover what's holding you back and build the confidence to move forward.
services.highlights:
12 one-to-one sessions
Personalised coaching plan
Practical tools & exercises
Email support between sessions
services.isThisForYou: If you feel stuck, lost, or like you're going through the motions — this programme is for you. We'll work together to uncover what you truly want and build the courage to go after it.

services.title: Career Coaching
services.description: The career edition of my mindset coaching. Whether you're a graduate, considering a career change, feeling unsatisfied at work, or experiencing redundancy, you'll get clear and confident on your career path.
services.highlights:
12 personalised sessions
Career roadmap
CV & interview support
Mindset & confidence coaching
services.isThisForYou: If your career isn't lighting you up or you're at a crossroads professionally — this programme is for you. We'll get you clear, confident, and ready to take decisive action.

services.title: Numerology
services.description: Need answers now? My 1-hour numerology session will help you glean crucial insight into your life path, relationships, and timing. Backed by ancient vedic practices for fast, focused answers.
services.highlights:
1-hour personalised session
Life path & expression numbers
Personal year cycle reading
Detailed follow-up notes
services.isThisForYou: If you need fast, focused insight and want a different perspective on your life's questions — this session is for you. Perfect when you need answers but aren't ready for a longer coaching commitment.

ctaHeading: Not sure which is right for you?
ctaSubtext: Book a free discovery call and we'll work it out together.
